zh-CN.title: 自我觉察 × 情绪调节｜双高协同
zh-CN.mechanism: 这个机制解释知道自己怎么了，与能不能把自己带回来之间的关系。这两项信号可以互相支持，重点是不要把稳定变成默认责任。
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 单个维度告诉你哪里强弱，组合机制解释为什么同一个分数会在现实关系里变成优势、代价或练习入口。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你通常既能看见线索，也能采取较可用的行动。
zh-CN.strength: 协同能力强，容易成为关系中的稳定点。
zh-CN.cost: 别人可能过度依赖你的稳定。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把机制放回一个具体场景，只练一个最小动作。
zh-CN.micro_action: 下次类似场景出现时，先说一句准备好的降温或澄清句。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 机制解释不是人格标签，也不是对每段关系的固定判断。

en.title: Self-awareness × Emotion regulation: both signals support each other
en.mechanism: This mechanism explains how knowing what is happening inside connects with bringing yourself back. The two signals can reinforce each other; the key is not turning stability into default responsibility.
en.why_it_matters: A single dimension shows strength or gap; a mechanism explains how the same score becomes strength, cost, or practice entry in real relationships.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can usually notice the signal and take a usable action.
en.strength: Strong coordination can make you a stabilizing presence.
en.cost: Others may rely too much on your steadiness.
en.development_lever: Put the mechanism back into one concrete scene and practice one smallest action.
en.micro_action: In the next similar scene, use one prepared cooling or clarifying sentence first.
en.do_not_overread: A mechanism is not a personality label or a fixed judgment about every relationship.

zh-CN.title: 自我觉察 × 情绪调节｜前者强，后者需要补位
zh-CN.mechanism: 这个机制解释知道自己怎么了，与能不能把自己带回来之间的关系。强项会让你更早发现问题，但弱项决定你能否把它落地。
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 单个维度告诉你哪里强弱，组合机制解释为什么同一个分数会在现实关系里变成优势、代价或练习入口。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你知道很多或感到很多，但后一步不够稳。
zh-CN.strength: 强项能成为练习入口。
zh-CN.cost: 强项可能因为后续动作不足而变成消耗。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把机制放回一个具体场景，只练一个最小动作。
zh-CN.micro_action: 下次类似场景出现时，先说一句准备好的降温或澄清句。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 机制解释不是人格标签，也不是对每段关系的固定判断。

en.title: Self-awareness × Emotion regulation: the first signal is stronger; the second needs support
en.mechanism: This mechanism explains how knowing what is happening inside connects with bringing yourself back. The strength helps you notice earlier, but the weaker signal determines whether it becomes usable action.
en.why_it_matters: A single dimension shows strength or gap; a mechanism explains how the same score becomes strength, cost, or practice entry in real relationships.
en.what_it_feels_like: You notice or feel a lot, but the next step is less stable.
en.strength: The stronger signal can become the practice entry point.
en.cost: The strength may become draining when follow-through is weak.
en.development_lever: Put the mechanism back into one concrete scene and practice one smallest action.
en.micro_action: In the next similar scene, use one prepared cooling or clarifying sentence first.
en.do_not_overread: A mechanism is not a personality label or a fixed judgment about every relationship.

zh-CN.title: 自我觉察 × 情绪调节｜后者强，前者需要补位
zh-CN.mechanism: 这个机制解释知道自己怎么了，与能不能把自己带回来之间的关系。行动能力存在，但如果前置信号不清，容易稳定地处理了错误问题。
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 单个维度告诉你哪里强弱，组合机制解释为什么同一个分数会在现实关系里变成优势、代价或练习入口。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能做出反应，但未必说得清真正触发点。
zh-CN.strength: 执行或稳定性较可用。
zh-CN.cost: 缺少命名会让同类问题反复出现。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把机制放回一个具体场景，只练一个最小动作。
zh-CN.micro_action: 下次类似场景出现时，先说一句准备好的降温或澄清句。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 机制解释不是人格标签，也不是对每段关系的固定判断。

en.title: Self-awareness × Emotion regulation: the second signal is stronger; the first needs support
en.mechanism: This mechanism explains how knowing what is happening inside connects with bringing yourself back. Action is available, but unclear input can make you solve the wrong problem steadily.
en.why_it_matters: A single dimension shows strength or gap; a mechanism explains how the same score becomes strength, cost, or practice entry in real relationships.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can respond, but may not know what actually triggered the situation.
en.strength: Execution or steadiness is usable.
en.cost: Weak naming lets similar situations repeat.
en.development_lever: Put the mechanism back into one concrete scene and practice one smallest action.
en.micro_action: In the next similar scene, use one prepared cooling or clarifying sentence first.
en.do_not_overread: A mechanism is not a personality label or a fixed judgment about every relationship.

zh-CN.title: 自我觉察 × 情绪调节｜两项都需要打底
zh-CN.mechanism: 这个机制解释知道自己怎么了，与能不能把自己带回来之间的关系。这不是失败信号，而是说明要先建立最小可重复流程。
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 单个维度告诉你哪里强弱，组合机制解释为什么同一个分数会在现实关系里变成优势、代价或练习入口。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你可能事后才发现自己已经很累或关系已经卡住。
zh-CN.strength: 从最小动作开始，反馈会更清楚。
zh-CN.cost: 复杂场景里容易被动应对。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把机制放回一个具体场景，只练一个最小动作。
zh-CN.micro_action: 下次类似场景出现时，先说一句准备好的降温或澄清句。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 机制解释不是人格标签，也不是对每段关系的固定判断。

en.title: Self-awareness × Emotion regulation: both signals need foundations
en.mechanism: This mechanism explains how knowing what is happening inside connects with bringing yourself back. This is not a failure signal; it points to the need for a smallest repeatable process.
en.why_it_matters: A single dimension shows strength or gap; a mechanism explains how the same score becomes strength, cost, or practice entry in real relationships.
en.what_it_feels_like: You may notice only afterward that you were drained or that the relationship was stuck.
en.strength: Small actions can make the feedback clearer.
en.cost: Complex scenes may push you into reactive coping.
en.development_lever: Put the mechanism back into one concrete scene and practice one smallest action.
en.micro_action: In the next similar scene, use one prepared cooling or clarifying sentence first.
en.do_not_overread: A mechanism is not a personality label or a fixed judgment about every relationship.

zh-CN.title: 共情理解 × 情绪调节｜双高协同
zh-CN.mechanism: 这个机制解释理解别人之后，能不能保留自己的节奏和恢复空间。这两项信号可以互相支持，重点是不要把稳定变成默认责任。

zh-CN.strength: 协同能力强，容易成为关系中的稳定点。

zh-CN.development_lever: 把机制放回一个具体场景，只练一个最小动作。
zh-CN.micro_action: 下次类似场景出现时，先说一句准备好的降温或澄清句。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 机制解释不是人格标签，也不是对每段关系的固定判断。

en.title: Self-awareness × Relationship management: the second signal is stronger; the first needs support
en.mechanism: This mechanism explains expressing yourself honestly while keeping the relationship open. Action is available, but unclear input can make you solve the wrong problem steadily.
en.why_it_matters: A single dimension shows strength or gap; a mechanism explains how the same score becomes strength, cost, or practice entry in real relationships.

zh-CN.title: 自我觉察 × 关系管理｜两项都需要打底
zh-CN.mechanism: 这个机制解释表达真实自己，同时让关系还能继续对话。这不是失败信号，而是说明要先建立最小可重复流程。
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 单个维度告诉你哪里强弱，组合机制解释为什么同一个分数会在现实关系里变成优势、代价或练习入口。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你可能事后才发现自己已经很累或关系已经卡住。
zh-CN.strength: 从最小动作开始，反馈会更清楚。
zh-CN.cost: 复杂场景里容易被动应对。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把机制放回一个具体场景，只练一个最小动作。

en.title: Self-awareness × Relationship management: both signals need foundations
en.mechanism: This mechanism explains expressing yourself honestly while keeping the relationship open. This is not a failure signal; it points to the need for a smallest repeatable process.
en.why_it_matters: A single dimension shows strength or gap; a mechanism explains how the same score becomes strength, cost, or practice entry in real relationships.
en.what_it_feels_like: You may notice only afterward that you were drained or that the relationship was stuck.
en.strength: Small actions can make the feedback clearer.
en.cost: Complex scenes may push you into reactive coping.
en.development_lever: Put the mechanism back into one concrete scene and practice one smallest action.
en.micro_action: In the next similar scene, use one prepared cooling or clarifying sentence first.
en.do_not_overread: A mechanism is not a personality label or a fixed judgment about every relationship.

zh-CN.title: 情绪调节 × 关系管理｜双高协同
zh-CN.mechanism: 这个机制解释压力下能不能沟通、降温和修复。这两项信号可以互相支持，重点是不要把稳定变成默认责任。
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 单个维度告诉你哪里强弱，组合机制解释为什么同一个分数会在现实关系里变成优势、代价或练习入口。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你通常既能看见线索，也能采取较可用的行动。
zh-CN.strength: 协同能力强，容易成为关系中的稳定点。
zh-CN.cost: 别人可能过度依赖你的稳定。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把机制放回一个具体场景，只练一个最小动作。
zh-CN.micro_action: 下次类似场景出现时，先说一句准备好的降温或澄清句。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 机制解释不是人格标签，也不是对每段关系的固定判断。
